It is a Meditation to balance the 7 Chakras.
Omurganız üzerinde belirli noktalarda di: There are 7 main chakras aligned at specific points along your spine. These chakras are as follows, from bottom to top:
Kök Çakra: Kök çakranın rengi kırmızıdır: Root Chakra: The color of the root chakra is red. Its element is earth. It is the foundation point. It represents the will to live, sense of security, sensitivity, survival, stability, and basic needs.
Sakral Çakra: Sakral çakra gökkuşağının: Sacral Chakra: The sacral chakra has the orange color of the rainbow. Its element is water. Physically linked to reproduction, mentally to creativity, and basic emotional needs.
Solar Prexus Çakrası: Güneşe benzetildiğ: Solar Plexus Chakra: Named so because of its resemblance to the sun. Also expressed as the solar network. Color is yellow, element is fire. Supports digestion, self-confidence, self-esteem, and spiritual growth.
Kalp Çakrası: Vücutta bulunan diğer alt: Heart Chakra: Its most important feature is being the chakra that connects lower and upper chakras. Heart chakra color is green, element is air. Represents love, compassion, forgiveness, and attachment. Physically related to circulation.
Boğaz Çakrası: Boğaz çakrasının rengi gö: Throat Chakra: The color of the throat chakra is sky blue. The fifth chakra represents the communication center. Relates to verbal communication, self-expression, listening, and understanding abilities.
Third Eye Chakra: Indigo color. Manages imagination, intuition, and looking from different perspectives.
Taç Çakra: Tepe çakrası olarak da adland: Crown Chakra: Also called the summit chakra, it is the seventh and highest main chakra. Color is purple. Represents pure consciousness, enlightenment, and awareness of the eternal self. Related to your connection to the universe, yourself, life, and others.

Eril ve dişil enerjiler sanılanın aksine: Contrary to popular belief, masculine and feminine energies do not mean male or female. Both energies are present in both women and men. Both energies have balanced, i.e., positive and negative aspects. A person's internal balance of masculine and feminine energy affects all their relationships. A balanced female individual should possess 60-70% balanced feminine traits and 30-40% balanced masculine traits in her system and attitude. For a balanced male individual, these ratios are the exact opposite. (Numbers are approximate.) One of the most important connections of masculine and feminine balance is the person's connection with their mother and father. This connection also symbolizes the connection with one's roots.
